body.title: Alex Chen
body.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer · Open Source Developer · AI Tooling Specialist
body.p: Passionate Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building developer tooling, cloud-native APIs, and AI-integrated systems. Core maintainer of ExtraSuite, an open-source CLI framework enabling AI agents to securely read and write Google Workspace files via a git-like pull/diff/push workflow. Deep expertise in Python, Google Workspace APIs, and LLM agent design patterns.

td.p: FastAPI, Flask, React, Pydantic, uv, ruff, mypy, pytest
Docs API, Sheets API, Slides API, Drive API, Gmail API, Calendar API
Google Cloud Run, GKE, Firebase, Docker, GitHub Actions, Terraform
Claude API, OpenAI API, LangChain, Agent SDK, MCP (Model Context Protocol)

body.li: Led design and development of ExtraSuite, an open-source CLI framework enabling AI agents (Claude Code, Codex) to securely operate on Google Workspace files

Implemented a pull/diff/push reconciliation engine in Python that converts Google Docs API JSON into editable XML and back — handling rich formatting, tables, lists, headers, footers, footnotes, and nested styles
Architected a 1:1 service account identity model giving each employee's AI agent minimal-scope, short-lived tokens; all agent actions appear in Google Drive version history
Designed and shipped ExtraSheet, ExtraSlide, and ExtraForm modules using the same workflow pattern — reducing agent code duplication by ~70%
Built a gateway server on Google Cloud Run providing OIDC-based token issuance, domain-wide delegation, and audit logging — serving 500+ requests/day
Implemented scope-limited OAuth delegation for Gmail and Calendar APIs
Reduced token issuance latency from 1.2s to 180ms via response caching
Published 3 independent packages to PyPI (extrasuite, extrasheet, extraslide) with trusted publishing via GitHub Actions OIDC — zero manual secrets
Built a multi-tenant data pipeline orchestration platform on GCP handling 2 TB+/day using Cloud Composer (Airflow) and BigQuery
Developed a self-service analytics API (FastAPI + PostgreSQL) used by 15+ business teams, cutting data request turnaround from 3 days to 4 hours
Integrated LLM-powered natural language to SQL feature — allowed non-technical users to query data warehouses in plain English; achieved 82% query accuracy
Mentored 4 junior engineers; introduced test-driven development practices that raised unit test coverage from 34% to 87%
Developed RESTful APIs for a banking client using Python/Django, integrated with core banking systems via SOAP/XML
Automated daily reconciliation workflows using Python scripts, saving ~20 hours/week of manual effort
Contributed to CI/CD pipeline setup on Jenkins and GitLab; participated in Agile sprints with cross-functional teams
body.p: github.com/think41/extrasuite · Stack: Python · Google Workspace APIs · Cloud Run · GitHub Actions
body.li: Novel XML-based document editing format allowing LLMs to reason about Google Doc structure without any Google API knowledge
Complete serde pipeline: JSON → AST → XML (pull) and XML diff → batchUpdate JSON (push)
Handles complex document features: nested lists, multi-level cascading styles, cross-tab operations, footnotes, and inline objects
Distributed as a skill via AgentSkills.io standard, enabling AI agents to discover and use ExtraSuite autonomously
Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer (2023)
Google Cloud Associate Cloud Engineer (2022)
AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (2021)
Fractal Analytics — "Innovator of the Quarter" Award, Q3 2023
Speaker, PyCon India 2023: "Building Secure AI Agent Tooling with Google Workspace APIs"
Languages: English (Fluent), Hindi (Native), Kannada (Conversational)
Interests: Open-source development, AI agent design patterns, developer tooling, technical writing, badminton

header.p: Alex Chen · Senior Software Engineer · alex.chen@think41.com
